Stay well,

Jordan

Hey there, {{first_name}},

Jordan here from Gentslux. I hope you’re enjoying the fresh start to your day. Since you're one of our valued wearers, I wanted to share something special that's helping many of our senior customers stay active this spring.

Remember Bob from Minnesota (68)? He wrote to me last week: "These pants saved my gardening hobby! Haven't had to replace a single pair in 2 years of kneeling in my vegetable garden. Completely waterproof and tough as nails." Frank, 68, from Florida said he wore his pair through morning rain, yard work, and even helped his grandkids with a DIY project—all in one day—without a single scratch or drop seeping in. We’ve found that 9 out of 10 folks feel more confident tackling their daily errands when they don’t have to worry about water-logged or ripped clothing. Plus, these pants offer a comfortable, stretchable waist for easy movement—an absolute must for any man who values a hassle-free routine.

Here's a quick tip I learned from our community: spray the knees with your garden hose before kneeling in damp soil. The water beads right off, and your knees stay dry for hours. Pretty neat, right?

Some quick facts about our updated FlexCamo pants:
- They're now 3x more water-resistant than regular tactical pants
- 73% of our customers came back for a second pair last month
- The reinforced knees outlasted competitor pants by 18 months in durability tests

Quick care tip: To maintain water resistance, just tumble dry on low for 15 minutes after washing. No special sprays needed.

Richard (72) from Florida wears his fishing every weekend: "Finally found pants that don't get soggy in the boat. Best investment for my retirement activities!"

A few quick tips from our community:
• Hang them to dry instead of machine-drying—prolongs the waterproof coating.
• Pair them with sturdy sneakers or boots for a supportive everyday look.
• Keep a small cloth handy to wipe off any mud or debris—no fuss.

Want to try them yourself? Free shipping on orders over $40 – no code needed, no exclusions. 

Many sizes are getting low (especially in Desert Sage), so I'd recommend grabbing yours soon.

Stay active,
Jordan

P.S. If you're wondering about the fit, we've added a comfort-fit waistband based on feedback from guys like you. No more adjusting throughout the day.
